name: E-10 rule deprecation lifecycle: migrate-rule emits a 'migrated <old> -> <new>' confirmation on stderr
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/migrate-rule.sh" old-rule --to new-rule 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'migrated old-rule -> new-rule' err.txt && echo confirmed 1>&2
